module_info.docstring:
Delegate Tool -- Subagent Architecture

Spawns child AIAgent instances with isolated context, restricted toolsets,
and their own terminal sessions. Supports single-task and batch (parallel)
modes. The parent blocks until all children complete.

Each child gets:
  - A fresh conversation (no parent history)
  - Its own task_id (own terminal session, file ops cache)
  - A restricted toolset (configurable, with blocked tools always stripped)
  - A focused system prompt built from the delegated goal + context

The parent's context only sees the delegation call and the summary result,
never the child's intermediate tool calls or reasoning.

functions.name: check_delegate_requirements
functions.docstring: Delegation has no external requirements -- always available.

functions.name: _build_child_system_prompt
functions.docstring: Build a focused system prompt for a child agent.

functions.name: _strip_blocked_tools
functions.docstring: Remove toolsets that contain only blocked tools.

functions.name: _build_child_progress_callback
functions.docstring:
Build a callback that relays child agent tool calls to the parent display.

Two display paths:
  CLI:     prints tree-view lines above the parent's delegation spinner
  Gateway: batches tool names and relays to parent's progress callback

Returns None if no display mechanism is available, in which case the
child agent runs with no progress callback (identical to current behavior).

functions.name: _flush
functions.docstring: Flush remaining batched tool names to gateway on completion.

functions.name: _run_single_child
functions.docstring:
Spawn and run a single child agent. Called from within a thread.
Returns a structured result dict.

functions.name: delegate_task
functions.docstring:
Spawn one or more child agents to handle delegated tasks.

Supports two modes:
  - Single: provide goal (+ optional context, toolsets)
  - Batch:  provide tasks array [{goal, context, toolsets}, ...]

Returns JSON with results array, one entry per task.

functions.name: _load_config
functions.docstring: Load delegation config from CLI_CONFIG if available.
